trigger_conditions: main/app.c: State_Poptavka_Vyroba sets NeedForTransport=true when MyCellInfo.IDofCell != Process.IDofCell
main/app.c: State_Poptavka_Transporty enters transport inquiry unless (!NeedForTransport && TypeOfProcess != Transport)

message_formats: Legacy Inquire transport request: 5 typed OPC UA args (uint16 IDInterpreter, byte TypeOfProcess=Transport, bool priority, byte param1, uint16 param2)
AAS ReportProduct InputMessage: decimal sr_id string
